li.label: in the process of breaking through

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Body Tempering
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The first step on the path of cultivation. The practitioner tempers flesh, blood, and muscle through harsh training and circulating crude qi. Their body surpasses mortal limits, but they are still bound by the fragility of flesh.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Marrow Cleansing
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Qi begins to penetrate deep into the body, purifying marrow and blood. Impurities are expelled and vitality surges. The cultivator’s endurance and recovery greatly surpass that of ordinary beings.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Bone Forging
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The skeleton is reforged with qi, becoming as strong as tempered steel. Each movement carries greater strength and resilience. Weapons that would shatter bone now barely leave a mark. the last stage for a mortal before embarking onto the path of cultivation.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Qi Gathering
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The cultivator learns to properly gather and circulate qi within their meridians. Energy flows like a river through the body, granting enhanced strength and the first true taste of supernatural power. \n\nRequire: Pure Qi source

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Foundation Establishment
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The cultivator stabilizes their cultivation and establishes a foundation. Their meridians widen and qi reserves deepen, allowing greater control and stronger techniques. \n\nRequire: Pure Qi source

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Core Shaping
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Qi condenses into a gleaming yellow core within the dantian. The cultivator’s life force transforms, separating them from mortal existence. From this point onward, ordinary mortals cannot harm them. at this stage, heavenly tribulation become something that cultivator have to worry about. \n\nRequire: Pure Qi source

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Golden Core
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The condensed core matures into a radiant Golden Core. Power flows endlessly from it, granting immense vitality and spiritual might. The cultivator now stands firmly above the mortal world. at this stage, cultivator no longer have a need to rest and sleep, and can replenish said needs by simply absorbing Qi from the air. \n\nRequire: Pure Qi source

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Nascent Soul
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The golden core shatters, birthing an indestructible nascent soul—a miniature self that escapes bodily death to reform elsewhere. Pawns regenerate from a drop of blood, their presence warping reality around them. at this stage, cultivator are capable of forming a layer of protective Qi around them. \n\nRequire: Nascent Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Transcendent
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Body and soul harmonize beyond mortal limitations. The cultivator walks between heaven and earth, wielding power that borders on the miraculous.. \n\nRequire: Nascent Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Half-Step Saint
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Standing at the threshold of sainthood, the cultivator has begun to comprehend the deeper laws of the world. Their strength already rivals that of ancient legends. \n\nRequire: Saint Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Saint
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: A Saint embodies profound understanding of heaven and earth. Their will alone can influence the world around them, and their presence inspires awe or terror. at this stage. cultivator can no longer be harmed by mortal, no matter the mean. even mortal with the help of extraordinary weapon wouldn't be able to harm this pawn. \n\nRequire: Saint Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Saint King
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Among Saints, this cultivator stands as a ruler. Their command of spiritual law is immense, capable of reshaping battlefields and overwhelming lesser Saints. \n\nRequire: Saint Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Immortal Ascension
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The cultivator transcends the mortal plane entirely. Having endured heavenly tribulation, they step onto the path of true immortality. \n\nRequire: Immortal Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: True Immortal
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Time loses its meaning to a True Immortal. Their body and soul exist in perfect balance with immortal qi, granting unimaginable longevity and power. \n\nRequire: Immortal Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Immortal Saint
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: An immortal who has mastered profound heavenly laws. Their existence carries both immortal vitality and saintly authority over the fabric of reality. \n\nRequire: Immortal Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Half-Step God
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Standing on the boundary between immortality and divinity, this being has begun to touch the power of creation itself. \n\nRequire: Immortal Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: True God
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: A True God commands divine authority. Mountains crumble and seas part before their will. Their power shapes the world as easily as mortals shape clay. \n\nRequire: Immortal Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Creation Realm
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: The creation realm, the final stage that a cultivator can ever reach, their entire being has transcended heaven and earth, and even the plains of reality itself. They hold the power to create their own "rule", to create their own Law and Dao, engraving them into the universe itself. Capable of even commanding the Heavenly Dao to do their bidding. Facing against them is almost impossible, only another Creator can match a Creator. This should be the peak of cultivation, however rumor has it that once a condition are met, they can step outside the domain. perhap a fragment of the first flame can direct you to the right way? \n\nRequire: Immortal Qi source

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.

CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.label: Outside the Domain
CultivatorOfTheRim.CultivationHediffDef.description: Beyond the boundary that is the domain of this universe and its linked world, there exists an existence that is the origin of all things, the beginning itself, the First Forge. A single spark of its flame could ignite the whole universe, recreate it anew, or even create a whole new domain. By embracing the fragment of the first flame, can one truly escape the boundary of universe, and step outside the domain.

li.gizmoTip: A layer of protection Qi produced by cultivator of high realm.
